jsonLd.title: NSE is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
